title: Supporting Afghan nationals: About the special programs - Canada.ca
content:
## Supporting Afghan nationals: About the special programs
The Government of Canada has welcomed Afghans through a number of special programs and measures.
We’ve received enough applications to fill all spots for our special programs. We’ll continue to:
- prioritize processing all eligible applications
- help vulnerable Afghans through: our regular immigration programs , such as economic, family reunification and refugee resettlement programs other options and pathways, such as the Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot .
- our regular immigration programs , such as economic, family reunification and refugee resettlement programs
- other options and pathways, such as the Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot .
Special Immigration Measures Program for Afghan nationals (and their families) who assisted the Government of Canada
Special humanitarian program focused on resettling vulnerable Afghans
Pathway to permanent residence for extended family members of former interpreters
Special program to sponsor Afghan refugees without refugee status from the UNHCR or a foreign state
Afghans who are extended family members of former language and cultural advisors
Contact us using our crisis situation web form . Please don’t send photos or other attachments until we ask you to.
You can also contact our Client Support Centre at 1-888-242-2100 if you’re in Canada.
Wait times may be longer due to call volumes.
If you call during business hours and the line is busy, you can contact us using the form above or call back another time.
